raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Otans btja dtwidedmits
Peezus Gaddus wezz/ 
kad tas par Kehniu
tappe/ un waldtja feschpade-
mits Gaddus Jerusaleme/ un
winna Mahtei btja Jerusa
Wahrda Zadaka Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kad tam
KUNGAM labbi patike pehz
wiſſu/ ko winna Tehws usjus
bij darrijs/ besween ka tas eekſch
ta KUNGA swehta Namma ne
gahje: Un tee Laudis famaita-
jahs wehl.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis istatsfija ta KUN-
GA Naimma angstas Wahrtis/
ir pee ta Muhra Owel ustaisfija
wiꞥſch dauds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch ustaifija arridsan
Pilsfahtus us to Kalnu Juhda/
un Meschôs taiſija wiꞥſch Stip-
rumus un Turkus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch karroja arridsan ar
to Ammonitenu Behrnu Kehni-
nu/ un pahrwarreia tohs/ un
teem Ammona Behrneem bij
tam tai Gaddá doht fiunts Ta-
lentus Sudraba/ un Definitś
tuhkſtoschus Korus Kweefchn/ un
definitś tuhkſtoschus Korus Mee-
schu/ fcho atneffe winnam Aimo-
na Behrni arridsan ohtrá un
trescha Gaddá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta stippinajahs Jotams/ jo
wiꞥſch taiſija fawus Zeltus ta
KUNGa fawa Deewa Breekfchá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Jot
Leetahm atteek/ un winna
ri/ un winna Zetki/ raugi/ t
rafstiti to Israëta un J
Kehniu Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch bija dtwided-
peezus Gaddus wezz/ kad ta-
Kehniu tappe/ un waldtja f
padefimits Gaddus Jerusale
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jotans aismitga
faweem Tehweem/ un tee ap
ke winna Dahwida Pilli/
Akas winna Dehls tappe
Kehniu winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas btja dtwided-
Gaddus wezz/ kad
tap Kehniu tappe/
waldtja feschpadesmits Gad-
Jerusaleme/ un ne darrija/
tam KUNGAM labbi patik-
ittin ka winna Tehws D-
wids.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet wiꞥſch staigaja ee-
to Israëta Kehniu Zettee-
wiꞥſch darrija arridsan te-
Baalim leetas Bildes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas pats kwehpinaja
didsan Innoma Dehla Eelei-
un dedsinaja fawus Dehlus u-
guni/ pehz to Pagazu Nega-
tibahm/ ko tas KUNG S
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
